title: AI Agent outputs internal reasoning after upgrade
symptom: After upgrading to n8n v1.123.0, the AI Agent node includes its internal reasoning in the output, which was not the case in v1.122.5.
not_this_if: Using a different version of n8n
root_cause: The change in output behavior is due to an update in the underlying LangChain prompt templates, which now includes the internal reasoning of the AI models in the response. This was not the intended behavior and can be adjusted by updating the LangChain library.
fix_steps: Restart n8n to apply the changes
Test the AI Agent node to ensure it no longer outputs reasoning
agent_instruction: Update the LangChain library to version 1.0.3 to suppress internal reasoning in outputs.
